candidates.name: Gavin Newsom
candidates.notes: Two-term governor. Signed nation's strictest gun laws, abortion sanctuary state legislation, banned assault weapons sales. Signed gender-affirming care protections for minors. Opposes school choice. Signed law banning parental notification for transgender students. NRA gave F rating during 2018 campaign. Former SF mayor and Lt. Governor.

profile.background: Entrepreneur and businessman; served as San Francisco mayor (2004-2011) and lieutenant governor (2011-2019) before becoming 40th governor in 2019.

candidates.name: Alex Padilla
candidates.notes: Appointed to Senate in 2021 (replaced Kamala Harris), elected 2022. First Latino senator from California. Former CA Secretary of State. Heritage Action 0% current session. Strong gun control advocate. Co-sponsored pathway to citizenship legislation. Opposes border wall. Supports Equality Act.

profile.education: Massachusetts Institute of Technology (BS Mechanical Engineering)
profile.background: Former California Secretary of State and Los Angeles City Council member. Engineer by training. First Latino to represent California in U.S. Senate. Appointed in 2021 to fill Kamala Harris's seat.

candidates.name: Adam Schiff
candidates.notes: Elected to Senate in 2024 (replaced Laphonza Butler). Led Trump impeachment inquiries as House Intelligence Committee Chair. Heritage Action 0% current session. NRA F rated. Supports assault weapons ban, red flag laws. Pro-choice. Supports DREAM Act and pathway to citizenship.

profile.education: Stanford University (BA Political Science), Harvard Law School (JD)
profile.background: Former federal prosecutor and U.S. House member for 24 years. Led first Trump impeachment as House Intelligence Committee chairman. Former California State Senator.

district_offices.address: 501 I St., Suite 12-600, Robert T. Matsui U.S. Courthouse
